title: Remove category field from framework
description: Strip the category field from all directive.json files, server types/watchers/aggregator, MCP tools, frontend store types, pipeline docs/schemas/templates, hooks, CLI templates, and CLAUDE.md.

scope.in: All directive.json, project.json, plan.json files; server types/watchers/aggregator/endpoints; MCP status and backlog tools; frontend store types and game panel displays; pipeline docs; validate-project-json.sh; CLI templates; CLAUDE.md
scope.out: furnitureCatalog.ts and game furniture categories (unrelated concept)

dod.criterion: No directive/project category enum references remain in framework code
All directive.json files have category field removed
Server compiles without category references (npm run type-check passes)
MCP tools work without category filtering
Pipeline docs don't mention category enum

tasks.title: Remove category field from all directive.json, project.json, and plan.json files
tasks.scope: Delete the category key-value pair from all 82 directive.json files, 19 project.json files, and 12 plan.json files using a batch operation.

dod.criterion: Zero directive.json files under .context/directives/ contain a category key
Zero project.json files under .context/directives/ contain a category key
Zero plan.json files under .context/directives/ contain a category key
All modified JSON files remain valid JSON
No other fields in the JSON files are altered

tasks.title: Remove category from server types, watchers, aggregator, HTTP endpoints, and MCP tools
tasks.scope: Remove category from server/types.ts, server/state/work-item-types.ts, server/state/aggregator.ts, server/index.ts, server/watchers/, mcp-server/, and scripts/foreman.ts.

dod.criterion: grep category server/ returns zero hits (excluding node_modules)
grep category mcp-server/ returns zero hits
npm run type-check passes with no errors
Server can start without runtime errors

tasks.title: Remove category from frontend store types, game panels, validation hook, and CLI templates
tasks.scope: Remove category from src/stores/types.ts, game panels (ActionPanel, StatusPanel, LogPanel), validate-project-json.sh REQUIRED_FIELDS, CLI templates, and replace category === 'game' gate in 09-execute-projects.md with path-based check.

dod.criterion: src/stores/types.ts contains no category references
ActionPanel, StatusPanel, LogPanel contain no category references
validate-project-json.sh REQUIRED_FIELDS does not include category
09-execute-projects.md visual feedback gate uses path-based check
npm run type-check passes

tasks.title: Remove category from pipeline docs, schemas, templates, and CLAUDE.md
tasks.scope: Remove category references from 9 pipeline doc files, CLAUDE.md Categories table, directive-json.md schema, template files, and any remaining references.

dod.criterion: CLAUDE.md contains no Categories table and no category field references
directive-json.md schema does not include category
grep across .claude/skills/directive/docs/ for 'category' returns zero framework-category hits
